nasb.text: “If any man has a stubborn and rebellious son who will not obey his father or his mother, and when they chastise him, he will not even listen to them,

esv.text: “If a man has a stubborn and rebellious son who will not obey the voice of his father or the voice of his mother, and, though they discipline him, will not listen to them,

cnv.text: “如果人有忤逆倔強的兒子，不聽從父母的話；父母管教他以後，他還是不聽從；

ccb.text: “如果一个人的儿子冥顽不灵、悖逆成性、屡教不改，
